intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. 40:00 at 72%. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 72% for 40:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 72%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 40:00 at 72%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 9% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 85% for 10:00. Then 43min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 85%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2/6. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 10:00 at 85%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 38min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 58% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 5:00. Then 38min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 3 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3: 110% FTP. You're 65 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/6. You're building something real here. 3 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 63% into session. 110% at 95-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 66% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 54min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2 reps left. 26 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/6. 2 to go. You've accumulated 54min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 70% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 2 intervals left. 26 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 77 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 74% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/6. You're 78% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5: 110% FTP. You're 81 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've done 58 minutes of hard work. You can do 1 more intervals. Believe it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 78% complete. Rep 5/6. Fatigue is real — hold form. 110%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 82% done. 0 intervals left. 14 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 82% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 82% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 6/6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 4:00 at 110%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 4:00 at 110%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 4:00 at 110%. Then 10 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 110-110% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 90% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 93 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
